posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @jane.martel,

You can’t. The formatting you’re showing is specific to the timeline column.

posts.author: jane.martel (Jane Martel)
posts.cookedHtml: Ah! Thank you for letting me know. I can stop trying now!
